name: Java
summary: Primary object-oriented programming language used for desktop, web and enterprise application development.

name: JavaScript
summary: Client-side scripting language used to create dynamic, interactive web experiences.

name: Python
summary: General-purpose programming language used for automation, data analysis, research and rapid prototyping.

name: HTML5
summary: Markup language used to structure accessible and standards-compliant web applications.

name: CSS3
summary: Stylesheet language used to create responsive layouts, visual identity and user interfaces.

name: JSON
summary: Lightweight data interchange format used throughout the portfolio and other software projects.

name: HTTP
summary: Core web protocol underpinning modern web services and REST-based applications.

name: REST APIs
summary: Architectural style for building interoperable web services and distributed applications.

name: Microsoft Power BI
summary: Business intelligence platform used for semantic modelling, analytics and executive reporting.

name: Power Query (M)
summary: ETL and transformation engine used to cleanse, standardise and prepare analytical datasets.

name: DAX
summary: Formula language used to create analytical measures, calculations and business logic within Power BI.

name: Microsoft Excel
summary: Spreadsheet platform used for modelling, analysis, data validation and reporting.

name: Microsoft SharePoint
summary: Collaboration and document management platform used for structured business information.

name: PowerShell
summary: Automation and administration language used to manage Microsoft infrastructure and cloud services.

name: Microsoft Teams
summary: Unified communications and collaboration platform supporting meetings, messaging and enterprise telephony.

name: Microsoft Teams Calling
summary: Cloud-based enterprise telephony platform replacing traditional PBX and PSTN services.

name: Voice over IP (VoIP)
summary: Technology for delivering voice communications across IP networks.

name: SIP
summary: Session Initiation Protocol used to establish and manage real-time voice communication sessions.

name: Microsoft Intune
summary: Cloud-based endpoint management platform for device configuration, security and application deployment.

name: Microsoft Entra
summary: Microsoft's cloud identity and access management platform providing authentication, authorisation and governance.
